classification.task_goal: Improve a prompt for a Stable Diffusion AI model to create an anime-style wallpaper.
primary_constraints: The face composed of symbols occupies 20% of the wallpaper.
The face should be centered on the image.
The color palette includes pink, violet, white, blue, and yellow.
The wallpaper must be of 4K resolution and high quality.
The image should provide a plain 2D feeling and not a 3D feeling.
classification.reasoning: The AI initially modified the color palette to include cyan instead of pink, which violated the user's constraints. The user pointed this out, and the AI corrected the color palette back to include pink, thus repairing the violation.
